---
name: New Entry Submission
about: Submit a new documented entry to the database
title: "[New Entry] "
labels: new-entry
assignees: ''
---

## ⚠️ Submissions without a direct link to an official U.S. government document will be closed immediately.

This tool accepts **only** entries traceable to official U.S. government sources (DOJ, FBI Vault, House Oversight, federal court records, or congressional documents).

---

### Name

Full name of the individual as it appears in the government document.

### Role

Their role or title as it relates to the documented connection (e.g., "Attorney", "Financier", "Associate").

### Connection Summary

One to three sentences describing the documented connection. **Must be based only on what the government document says.** No speculation, no inference, no legal conclusions.

### Government Source Name

Exact title of the government document.

### Government Source URL

**Must be a direct link to an official .gov document, federal court record, or congressional record.**

URL shorteners will not be accepted. News article links are not accepted. Personal website links are not accepted.

### Source Date

Publication or filing date of the source document (YYYY-MM-DD format).

### Notes

(Optional) Any additional context that helps verify the entry.
